column5: Quentin Jones, friend of the film club, listed his top 20 on the most recent episode of Jackson Film Club The Podcast. Quentin found himself in Jackson after working on the film crew for the episode of We Are Here created in Jackson in 2022. His first and foremost reason for his residence in the city is the love of his life, Lydia. His second reason is his mission for cannabis awareness and advancement in the state's new medical marijuana program. His third reason is the great dance floor at Shade. This top 20 list features epic American classics and some of the most innovative and groundbreaking cinema in the world. Tune in to our conversation wherever you get your podcasts. Though this is presented as a ranked list, the films in positions 22 - 24 are honorable mentions and despicable artists-now-canceled.
